LINE_NDC_CD 

LABEL: Line National Drug Code (NDC) 

DESCRIPTION: This field is the National Drug Code (NDC) identifying the specific drug.

LONG NAME: LINE_NDC_CD 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 11 

SOURCE: Medicare Advantage Organizations (MAOs) 

FILE(S): Carrier Line 
DME Line
